title: Oil prices plunge below $100 after Iran agrees to safe passage through Strait of Hormuz during ceasefire
summary_full: President Donald Trump agreed to the ceasefire with Iran after discussions with Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.
summary_public: President Donald Trump agreed to the ceasefire with Iran after discussions with Pakistan Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Oil prices plunge below $100 after Iran agrees to safe passage
